info.title: dotnet-repl
info.description: A polyglot command line REPL for C#, F#, SQL, and other languages.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --log-path
options.description: Enable file logging to the specified directory

options.name: --default-kernel
options.description: The default language for the kernel

options.name: --run
options.description: Run all of the code in the specified notebook, source code, or script file. To exit when done, set the --exit-after-run option.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: Working directory to which to change after launching the kernel

options.name: --exit-after-run
options.description: Exit after the file specified by --run has run

options.name: --output-format
options.description: The output format to be used when running a notebook with the --run and --exit-after-run options

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Run the file specified by --run and writes the output to the file specified by --output-path

options.name: --input
options.description: Specifies in a value for @input tokens in magic commands in the notebook, using the format --input <key>=<value>. Values containing spaces should be wrapped in quotes.
